tool_input.prompt:
Explore the codebase structure to understand:
1. What type of application this is (web app, CLI tool, etc.)
2. What theming and styling approaches are currently used
3. What formatting conventions are in place
4. Identify files related to styling, theming, and formatting

Look for:
- CSS/Sass files
- Theme configurations
- Style-related code in components
- Any existing theming system
- Code formatting configurations (prettier, eslint, etc.)

Return a comprehensive summary of the current theming and formatting state, including file paths and specific areas that could be improved.

         static let iconStandard: CGFloat = 13

     }

+    // MARK: - Semantic Colors

+        /// Success/positive state color

+        static let warning = Self.p3Color(r: 0.9, g: 0.6, b: 0.1)

+        static let error = Self.p3Color(r: 0.9, g: 0.25, b: 0.2)
+        /// Informational state color
+        static let info = Self.p3Color(r: 0.1, g: 0.6, b: 0.9)
+    }
+
+    // MARK: - Component Tokens
+
+    enum Component {
+        enum Button {
+            /// Minimum tap target size (44pt)
+            static let minTapTarget: CGFloat = 44
+            /// Standard button height (36pt)
+            static let height: CGFloat = 36
+            /// Large button height (48pt)

+            /// Small button height (28pt)

+            /// Button content padding (16pt)

+        }
+
+        enum Card {
+            /// Standard card padding (16pt)
+            static let padding: CGFloat = 16
+            /// Card elevation shadow opacity (0.08)
+            static let shadowOpacity: Double = 0.08
+            /// Card elevation shadow radius (8pt)
+            static let shadowRadius: CGFloat = 8
+        }
+
+        enum Input {
+            /// Standard input field height (36pt)
+            static let height: CGFloat = 36
+            /// Input field padding (12pt)
+            static let paddingHorizontal: CGFloat = 12
+            /// Text area minimum height (100pt)
+            static let textAreaMinHeight: CGFloat = 100
+        }
+
+        enum List {
+            /// Standard list item height (44pt)
+            static let itemHeight: CGFloat = 44
+            /// Compact list item height (32pt)
+            static let itemHeightCompact: CGFloat = 32
+            /// List item indentation (20pt)
+            static let indentation: CGFloat = 20
+        }
+
+        enum Toolbar {
+            /// Toolbar item spacing (8pt)
+            static let itemSpacing: CGFloat = 8
+            /// Toolbar padding (12pt)
+            static let padding: CGFloat = 12
+        }
+
+        enum Modal {
+            /// Modal corner radius (12pt)
+            static let cornerRadius: CGFloat = 12
+            /// Modal shadow radius (16pt)
+            static let shadowRadius: CGFloat = 16
+            /// Modal backdrop opacity (0.4)
+            static let backdropOpacity: Double = 0.4
+        }
+    }
+
+    // MARK: - Animation Presets
+
+    enum AnimationPreset {
+        /// Instant transition (no animation)
+        static let instant = Animation.linear(duration: 0)
+        /// Very fast interaction (0.1s)
+        static let veryFast = Animation.easeInOut(duration: 0.1)
+        /// Fast interaction (0.15s)
+        static let fast = Animation.easeInOut(duration: 0.15)
+        /// Standard interaction (0.2s)
+        static let standard = Animation.easeInOut(duration: 0.2)
+        /// Medium transition (0.25s)
+        static let medium = Animation.easeInOut(duration: 0.25)
+        /// Slow transition (0.35s)
+        static let slow = Animation.easeInOut(duration: 0.35)
+        /// Very slow transition (0.5s)
+        static let verySlow = Animation.easeInOut(duration: 0.5)
+
+        /// Spring animation for responsive interactions
+        static func spring(response: TimeInterval = 0.28, damping: CGFloat = 0.82) -> Animation {
+            .spring(response: response, dampingFraction: damping)
+        }
+
+        /// Smooth animation with modern easing
+        @available(macOS 15.0, iOS 17.0, *)
+        static func smooth(duration: TimeInterval = 0.25) -> Animation {
+            .smooth(duration: duration)
+        }
+
+        /// Bouncy spring animation for playful interactions
+        @available(macOS 15.0, iOS 17.0, *)
+        static let bouncy = Animation.bouncy
+    }
+
+    // MARK: - Transition Presets
+
+    enum TransitionPreset {
+        /// Fade transition
+        static let fade: AnyTransition = .opacity
+
+        /// Slide in from bottom
+        static let slideFromBottom: AnyTransition = .move(edge: .bottom).combined(with: .opacity)
+
+        /// Slide in from top
+        static let slideFromTop: AnyTransition = .move(edge: .top).combined(with: .opacity)
+
+        /// Slide in from leading (left in LTR)
+        static let slideFromLeading: AnyTransition = .move(edge: .leading).combined(with: .opacity)
+
+        /// Slide in from trailing (right in LTR)
+        static let slideFromTrailing: AnyTransition = .move(edge: .trailing).combined(with: .opacity)
+
+        /// Scale with fade
+        static let scaleFade: AnyTransition = .asymmetric(
+            insertion: .opacity.combined(with: .scale(scale: 0.98)),
+            removal: .opacity.combined(with: .scale(scale: 1.02))
+        )
+
+        /// Push transition (slide out old, slide in new)
+        static func push(from edge: Edge) -> AnyTransition {
+            .asymmetric(
+                insertion: .move(edge: edge).combined(with: .opacity),
+                removal: .move(edge: edge.opposite).combined(with: .opacity)
+            )
+        }
+    }
+

+

+        static let xxs: CGFloat = 2

+        /// Extra large (16pt)

+        /// Extra extra large (24pt)
+        static let xxl: CGFloat = 24
+        /// Extra extra extra large (32pt)
+        static let xxxl: CGFloat = 32
+    }
 }

            codeText: p3Color(r: lightBase.r + 0.2, g: lightBase.g + 0.2, b: lightBase.b + 0.2),

            blockquoteText: p3Color(r: lightBase.r + 0.2, g: lightBase.g + 0.2, b: lightBase.b + 0.2),

            tableBorder: p3Color(r: 0.88, g: 0.88, b: 0.90),
            tableRowAlternating: p3Color(r: 0.0, g: 0.0, b: 0.0, a: 0.02),
            listMarker: p3Color(r: lightAccent.r, g: lightAccent.g, b: lightAccent.b),
            taskListUnchecked: p3Color(r: lightBase.r + 0.2, g: lightBase.g + 0.2, b: lightBase.b + 0.2),
            taskListChecked: p3Color(r: 0.2, g: 0.6, b: 0.3),
            horizontalRule: p3Color(r: 0.85, g: 0.85, b: 0.88),
            selectionBackground: p3Color(r: 0.20, g: 0.50, b: 0.90, a: 0.25),
            selectionText: .black
        )

        let dark = ThemeColorData(
            textPrimary: p3Color(r: darkBase.r, g: darkBase.g, b: darkBase.b),
            textSecondary: p3Color(r: darkBase.r - 0.2, g: darkBase.g - 0.2, b: darkBase.b - 0.2),

            codeText: p3Color(r: darkBase.r - 0.2, g: darkBase.g - 0.2, b: darkBase.b - 0.2),
            blockquoteAccent: p3Color(r: darkAccent.r, g: darkAccent.g, b: darkAccent.b),
            blockquoteBackground: p3Color(r: darkAccent.r, g: darkAccent.g, b: darkAccent.b, a: 0.08),
            blockquoteText: p3Color(r: darkBase.r - 0.2, g: darkBase.g - 0.2, b: darkBase.b - 0.2),
            tableHeaderBackground: p3Color(r: 0.25, g: 0.25, b: 0.27),
            tableBorder: p3Color(r: 0.35, g: 0.35, b: 0.38),
            tableRowAlternating: p3Color(r: 1.0, g: 1.0, b: 1.0, a: 0.03),
            listMarker: p3Color(r: darkAccent.r, g: darkAccent.g, b: darkAccent.b),
            taskListUnchecked: p3Color(r: darkBase.r - 0.2, g: darkBase.g - 0.2, b: darkBase.b - 0.2),
            taskListChecked: p3Color(r: 0.3, g: 0.7, b: 0.4),
            horizontalRule: p3Color(r: 0.35, g: 0.35, b: 0.38),
            selectionBackground: p3Color(r: 0.25, g: 0.50, b: 0.90, a: 0.4),
            selectionText: .white
        )

        return ThemeData(name: name, light: light, dark: dark)
    }

    /// All available themes
    static let allThemes: [ThemeData] = [
        basic, github, docC, solarized, gruvbox, dracula, monokai, nord, onedark, tokyonight
    ]
}

// MARK: - Color Helper

extension NativeThemePalette {
    fileprivate static func p3Color(r: CGFloat, g: CGFloat, b: CGFloat, a: CGFloat = 1.0) -> NSColor {
        NSColor(red: r, green: g, blue: b, alpha: a)
    }
}

closure_body_length:
  warning: 30
  error: 50

cyclomatic_complexity:
  warning: 10
  error: 20
  ignores_case_statements: true

file_length:
  warning: 500
  error: 1000

  warning: 60
  error: 100

function_parameter_count:
  warning: 5
  error: 8

large_tuple:
  warning: 3
  error: 4

nesting:
  type_level:
    warning: 3
  statement_level:
    warning: 5

type_body_length:
  warning: 400
  error: 600

type_name:
  min_length:
    warning: 3
    error: 2
  max_length:
    warning: 50
    error: 60
  excluded:
    - ID

identifier_name:
  min_length:
    warning: 2
    error: 1
  max_length:
    warning: 50
    error: 60
  excluded:
    - id
    - x
    - y
    - i
    - j
    - k

number_separator:
  minimum_length: 5

file_types_order:
  order:
    - supporting_type
    - main_type

type_contents_order:
  order:
    - case
    - associated_type
    - type_alias
    - subtype
    - type_property
    - instance_property
    - initializer
    - deinitializer
    - type_method
    - view_life_cycle_method
    - other_method
    - subscript

attributes:
  always_on_same_line:
    - "@IBAction"
    - "@IBOutlet"
    - "@IBInspectable"
    - "@IBDesignable"
    - "@NSManaged"
    - "@objc"
    - "@State"
    - "@Binding"
    - "@ObservedObject"
    - "@Environment"
    - "@AppStorage"
  always_on_line_above:
    - "@available"
    - "@discardableResult"

multiline_arguments:
  first_argument_location: any

expiring_todo:
  approaching_expiry_threshold: 15
  expired_severity: error

modifier_order:
  preferred_modifier_order:
    - public
    - open
    - internal
    - fileprivate
    - private
    - private(set)
    - final
    - required
    - convenience
    - static
    - class
    - actor
    - isolated
    - nonisolated
    - lazy
    - weak
    - unowned
    - Optional
    - indirect
    - inout
    - mutating
    - nonmutating
    - prefix
    - postfix

file_header:
  required_pattern: |
    \/\/
    \/\/ .*?\.swift
    \/\/ mdviewer
    \/\/

missing_docs:
  error:
    - public
  warning:
    - internal

# Custom rules
custom_rules:
  no_print:
    name: "No print statements"
    regex: '(^|[^\'])\bprint\s*\('
    message: "Use os_log or Logger instead of print"
    severity: warning

  no_nslog:
    name: "No NSLog statements"
    regex: 'NSLog\s*\('
    message: "Use os_log or Logger instead of NSLog"
    severity: error

  no_uidebugging:
    name: "No UI debugging"
    regex: '(UIDebuggingInformationOverlay|_printHierarchy)'
    message: "Remove UI debugging code before committing"
    severity: error

  no_force_unwrap:
    name: "No force unwrap"
    regex: '\!\s*(?!\s*[=])'
    message: "Avoid force unwrapping"
    severity: warning

  no_weak_self_self:
    name: "No [weak self] self"
    regex: '\[weak self\][^\{]*\{[^}]*self\.'
    message: "Use [weak self] with guard let self else { return } pattern"
    severity: warning

  prefer_type_inference:
    name: "Prefer type inference"
    regex: ':\s*(Int|Double|String|Bool|CGFloat)\s*=\s*\1'
    message: "Use type inference for simple initializations"
    severity: warning

# Rule configurations
analyzer_rules:
  - capture_variable
  - explicit_self
  - typesafe_array_init
  - unused_declaration
  - unused_import

closure_body_length:
  warning: 30
  error: 50

cyclomatic_complexity:
  warning: 10
  error: 20
  ignores_case_statements: true

file_length:
  warning: 500
  error: 1000

function_body_length:
  warning: 60
  error: 100

function_parameter_count:
  warning: 5
  error: 8

large_tuple:
  warning: 3
  error: 4

nesting:
  type_level:
    warning: 3
  statement_level:
    warning: 5

type_body_length:
  warning: 400
  error: 600

type_name:
  min_length:
    warning: 3
    error: 2
  max_length:
    warning: 50
    error: 60
  excluded:
    - ID

identifier_name:
  min_length:
    warning: 2
    error: 1
  max_length:
    warning: 50
    error: 60
  excluded:
    - id
    - x
    - y
    - i
    - j
    - k

number_separator:
  minimum_length: 5

file_types_order:
  order:
    - supporting_type
    - main_type

type_contents_order:
  order:
    - case
    - associated_type
    - type_alias
    - subtype
    - type_property
    - instance_property
    - initializer
    - deinitializer
    - type_method
    - view_life_cycle_method
    - other_method
    - subscript

attributes:
  always_on_same_line:
    - "@IBAction"
    - "@IBOutlet"
    - "@IBInspectable"
    - "@IBDesignable"
    - "@NSManaged"
    - "@objc"
    - "@State"
    - "@Binding"
    - "@ObservedObject"
    - "@Environment"
    - "@AppStorage"
  always_on_line_above:
    - "@available"
    - "@discardableResult"

multiline_arguments:
  first_argument_location: any

expiring_todo:
  approaching_expiry_threshold: 15
  expired_severity: error

modifier_order:
  preferred_modifier_order:
    - public
    - open
    - internal
    - fileprivate
    - private
    - private(set)
    - final
    - required
    - convenience
    - static
    - class
    - actor
    - isolated
    - nonisolated
    - lazy
    - weak
    - unowned
    - Optional
    - indirect
    - inout
    - mutating
    - nonmutating
    - prefix
    - postfix

file_header:
  required_pattern: |
    \/\/
    \/\/ .*?\.swift
    \/\/ mdviewer
    \/\/

missing_docs:
  error:
    - public
  warning:
    - internal

# Custom rules
custom_rules:
  no_print:
    name: "No print statements"
    regex: '(^|[^\\''])\\bprint\\s*\\('
    message: "Use os_log or Logger instead of print"
    severity: warning

  no_nslog:
    name: "No NSLog statements"
    regex: 'NSLog\\s*\\('
    message: "Use os_log or Logger instead of NSLog"
    severity: error

  no_uidebugging:
    name: "No UI debugging"
    regex: '(UIDebuggingInformationOverlay|_printHierarchy)'
    message: "Remove UI debugging code before committing"
    severity: error

  no_force_unwrap:
    name: "No force unwrap"
    regex: '\\!\\s*(?!\\s*[=])'
    message: "Avoid force unwrapping"
    severity: warning

  no_weak_self_self:
    name: "No [weak self] self"
    regex: '\\[weak self\\][^\\{]*\\{[^}]*self\\.'
    message: "Use [weak self] with guard let self else { return } pattern"
    severity: warning

  prefer_type_inference:
    name: "Prefer type inference"
    regex: ':\\s*(Int|Double|String|Bool|CGFloat)\\s*=\\s*\\1'
    message: "Use type inference for simple initializations"
    severity: warning

  avoid_any_type:
    name: "Avoid Any type"
    regex: '\\bAny\\b'
    message: "Avoid using 'Any', prefer specific types or generics"
    severity: warning

  no_hardcoded_strings:
    name: "No hardcoded strings"
    regex: '"[^"]{3,}"'
    message: "Consider using NSLocalizedString for user-facing strings"
    severity: warning

  prefer_dependency_injection:
    name: "Prefer dependency injection"
    regex: '\\(as\\s+\\w+\\)\\s*$'
    message: "Consider using dependency injection instead of service location"
    severity: warning
